request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and security, I'm glad to see our leaders reinforcing NATO commitments. The world is unpredictable, and strong alliances are our best defense. Remember the chaos when we hesitated in the past? We can't afford that again. Supporting our allies isn't just about them—it's about protecting our own families. #StrongerTogether #NATOWorks
